summary: Debugged lookahead bias in factor neutralization pipeline; fixed expanding window mean
Reviewed IC decay curves for momentum, value, quality factors; momentum shows 15d half-life
Fixed keyed queue race condition when two WhatsApp messages arrive within 100ms
Added dual timeout pattern: 30s tool-call, 90s total; fallback to plain text reply
Designed IGSL v2 architecture: skill graph + memory node network + 5 integration bridges
Implemented Barra-style risk model with 10 style factors; validated against Wind factor library
Discussed options flow as potential alpha signal; decided to track as LOOP item pending data access
Designed crash recovery supervisor with 5s backoff; max 3 restarts/hour to prevent thrash
Built skill.py CLI with BM25 search, EMA health scoring, EvoGraph lineage tracking
Defined memory node types and half-lives: DEC permanent, PAT 30d, ARCH 60d, ART 14d, LOOP permanent
Token budget analysis: T0+T1+Index+Hard = 640 tokens always; soft skills load on demand
Implemented NLP sentiment factor using SnowNLP + BERT-base-chinese; IC ~0.03 standalone
Weekly portfolio rebalance decision: Friday close, min turnover 1% to trigger trade
Built memory/node.py with half-life decay, BM25 search, contradiction detection via embeddings
Implemented embed.py wrapping all-MiniLM-L6-v2; graceful degradation to BM25 if torch not available
Built integrate.py with 5 bidirectional connections between skill graph and memory network
Implemented session_start_v2.sh hook: project detection, active index rebuild, health-sync
PostToolUse hook health_recorder.py: writes tool log, ART nodes for file writes, failure journal
Stop hook retrospective_v2.py: infinite loop prevention via stop_hook_active check, post-session synthesis
cascade_watcher.py: detects MCP file changes, git drift, health degradation, cascade dependencies
Discussed calendar/email integration for OpenClaude; tracked as LOOP OC-005 pending Google API setup
Built apply_proposals.py: interactive y/n/edit/skip-all review; archives to _proposed/applied/
Autoresearch scheduler producing daily factor report + signal update; launchd plist at 08:30 HKT
Completed IGSL v2 build: skill.py, node.py, integrate.py, all hooks, settings_v2.json
Seeded 44 memory nodes covering HMS, OpenClaude, skill-graph decisions, MCP architecture, general patterns
